0.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Occasional linear atelectasis in both lungs

2.text: Consolidation in the anteromediobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the anteromediobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
